name: Split Pea Soup- Crockpot
recipeInstructions:
1. Add butter to the crockpot.
2. Add onions and cook for 5 minutes.
3. Add water, split peas, cloves, bay leaf, bacon, celery, carrots, marjoram, salt, and pepper.
4. Cover and cook on low for 8 to 10 hours.
5. Before serving, remove the bay leaf and cloves.
